settings.html:
<!-- Meridien Foods — Redesigned Homepage | Elementor HTML Widget -->
<!-- Paste this entire block into an Elementor HTML widget -->

<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:wght@700;900&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<style>
/* ── SCOPE: .mf-home ─────────────────────────────────── */
:root {
  --mf-red:     #C0271A;
  --mf-red-dk:  #8B1A10;
  --mf-red-lt:  #F5E8E6;
  --mf-cream:   #FBF7F2;
  --mf-charcoal:#1C1C1C;
  --mf-gray:    #6B6B6B;
  --mf-border:  #E8DDD6;
  --mf-white:   #FFFFFF;
  --mf-gold:    #B8860B;
}

.mf-home * { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

.mf-home {
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  background: var(--mf-white);
}

/* ── HEADER / NAV ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-nav {
  position: sticky;
  top: 0;
  z-index: 999;
  background: var(--mf-charcoal);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 0 48px;
  height: 64px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
}
.mf-nav-logo img {
  height: 40px;
  width: auto;
  object-fit: contain;
}
.mf-nav-logo span {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 22px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}
.mf-nav-links {
  display: flex;
  list-style: none;
  gap: 32px;
}
.mf-nav-links li a {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8);
  text-decoration: none;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  letter-spacing: 0.3px;
  transition: color 0.2s;
}
.mf-nav-links li a:hover { color: #fff; }
.mf-nav-right {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 16px;
}
.mf-nav-phone {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
  font-size: 13px;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 6px;
}
.mf-nav-phone:hover { color: #fff; }
.mf-nav-cta {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 9px 20px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.mf-nav-cta:hover { background: var(--mf-red-dk); }

/* ── HERO ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-hero {
  position: relative;
  min-height: 580px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--mf-charcoal);
}
.mf-hero-bg {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
  opacity: 0.35;
}
.mf-hero-overlay {
  position: absolute;
  inset: 0;
  background: linear-gradient(110deg, rgba(28,28,28,0.95) 45%, rgba(192,39,26,0.3) 100%);
}
.mf-hero-content {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 2;
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 80px 48px;
  width: 100%;
}
.mf-hero-tag {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.mf-hero-tag::before {
  content: '';
  width: 24px;
  height: 2px;
  background: var(--mf-red);
  display: inline-block;
}
.mf-hero-h1 {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(40px, 5vw, 68px);
  font-weight: 900;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  line-height: 1.05;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  max-width: 600px;
}
.mf-hero-h1 em {
  color: var(--mf-red);
  font-style: normal;
}
.mf-hero-sub {
  font-size: 16px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 480px;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
}
.mf-hero-btns {
  display: flex;
  gap: 14px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-btn-primary {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s;
}
.mf-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--mf-red-dk); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.mf-btn-outline {
  background: transparent;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.85);
  padding: 14px 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 15px;
  font-weight: 500;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.mf-btn-outline:hover { border-color: #fff; color: #fff; }
.mf-hero-badges {
  display: flex;
  gap: 28px;
  margin-top: 48px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-hero-badge {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  font-size: 13px;
}
.mf-hero-badge-icon {
  width: 32px;
  height: 32px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(192,39,26,0.2);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 15px;
}

/* ── DELIVERY STRIP ───────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-delivery-strip {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  padding: 14px 48px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 40px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-delivery-item {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.92);
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.mf-delivery-sep {
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
  font-size: 18px;
}

/* ── SECTION COMMON ───────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-section {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 80px 48px;
}
.mf-section-eyebrow {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  display: block;
}
.mf-section-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 42px);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}
.mf-section-sub {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: var(--mf-gray);
  line-height: 1.7;
  max-width: 520px;
}

/* ── CATEGORIES ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-cats-wrap { background: var(--mf-cream); }
.mf-cats-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 16px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}
.mf-cat-card {
  background: var(--mf-white);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--mf-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 24px 16px;
  text-align: center;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
  display: block;
}
.mf-cat-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(192,39,26,0.12);
  border-color: var(--mf-red);
}
.mf-cat-img {
  width: 80px;
  height: 80px;
  object-fit: contain;
  margin: 0 auto 14px;
  display: block;
  transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.mf-cat-card:hover .mf-cat-img { transform: scale(1.08); }
.mf-cat-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.mf-cat-count {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--mf-gray);
}

/* ── FEATURED PRODUCTS ────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-prod-header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: 36px;
  gap: 20px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-prod-tabs {
  display: flex;
  gap: 4px;
  background: var(--mf-cream);
  padding: 4px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}
.mf-prod-tab {
  padding: 8px 18px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 500;
  cursor: pointer;
  border: none;
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--mf-gray);
  transition: all 0.15s;
  font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif;
}
.mf-prod-tab.active {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.mf-prod-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
}
.mf-prod-card {
  background: var(--mf-white);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--mf-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
}
.mf-prod-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  transform: translateY(-3px);
}
.mf-prod-img-wrap {
  background: var(--mf-cream);
  padding: 20px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 180px;
  position: relative;
}
.mf-prod-img {
  width: 130px;
  height: 130px;
  object-fit: contain;
}
.mf-prod-badge {
  position: absolute;
  top: 10px;
  left: 10px;
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 10px;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
  padding: 4px 8px;
  border-radius: 4px;
}
.mf-prod-info {
  padding: 16px;
  border-top: 0.5px solid var(--mf-border);
}
.mf-prod-name {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  line-height: 1.35;
}
.mf-prod-weight {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--mf-gray);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.mf-prod-footer {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 8px;
}
.mf-prod-price {
  font-size: 16px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-red);
}
.mf-prod-cta {
  background: var(--mf-charcoal);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 7px 14px;
  border-radius: 5px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.15s;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.mf-prod-cta:hover { background: var(--mf-red); }
.mf-view-all-wrap {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 36px;
}
.mf-btn-red-outline {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 13px 36px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--mf-red);
  color: var(--mf-red);
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s, color 0.2s;
}
.mf-btn-red-outline:hover { background: var(--mf-red); color: #fff; }

/* ── WHY MERIDIEN ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-why-wrap { background: var(--mf-charcoal); }
.mf-why-inner {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 80px 48px;
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 64px;
  align-items: center;
}
.mf-why-eyebrow {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  margin-bottom: 14px;
  display: block;
}
.mf-why-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 40px);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.mf-why-desc {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.6);
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin-bottom: 32px;
}
.mf-why-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 20px;
}
.mf-why-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 20px;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s;
}
.mf-why-card:hover {
  background: rgba(192,39,26,0.12);
  border-color: rgba(192,39,26,0.4);
}
.mf-why-icon {
  font-size: 26px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  display: block;
}
.mf-why-card-title {
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.mf-why-card-desc {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.mf-why-image {
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  height: 480px;
  position: relative;
}
.mf-why-image img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}
.mf-why-image-badge {
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 20px;
  left: 20px;
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  padding: 10px 18px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── DELIVERY CITIES ──────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-cities-wrap { background: var(--mf-cream); }
.mf-cities-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}
.mf-city-card {
  background: var(--mf-white);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--mf-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  text-align: center;
}
.mf-city-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 160px;
  object-fit: cover;
}
.mf-city-info {
  padding: 20px;
}
.mf-city-name {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 20px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.mf-city-tag {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ── TESTIMONIALS ─────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-test-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 40px;
}
.mf-test-card {
  background: var(--mf-white);
  border: 0.5px solid var(--mf-border);
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 24px;
}
.mf-test-stars {
  color: #E8A020;
  font-size: 15px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  letter-spacing: 2px;
}
.mf-test-quote {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
  line-height: 1.7;
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  font-style: italic;
}
.mf-test-author {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 10px;
}
.mf-test-avatar {
  width: 38px;
  height: 38px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--mf-red-lt);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.mf-test-name {
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--mf-charcoal);
}
.mf-test-city {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--mf-gray);
}

/* ── B2B CUSTOMERS ────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-b2b-wrap { background: var(--mf-charcoal); }
.mf-b2b-inner {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 80px 48px;
}
.mf-b2b-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: flex-end;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-bottom: 48px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-b2b-eyebrow {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  letter-spacing: 2.5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  margin-bottom: 12px;
  display: block;
}
.mf-b2b-title {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: clamp(28px, 3vw, 40px);
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  line-height: 1.15;
}
.mf-b2b-subtitle {
  font-size: 15px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  margin-top: 10px;
  max-width: 420px;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.mf-b2b-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 16px;
}
.mf-b2b-card {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
  border-radius: 14px;
  padding: 32px 24px 28px;
  text-decoration: none;
  display: block;
  transition: background 0.2s, border-color 0.2s, transform 0.2s;
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.mf-b2b-card::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 3px;
  background: var(--mf-red);
  transform: scaleX(0);
  transform-origin: left;
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}
.mf-b2b-card:hover {
  background: rgba(192,39,26,0.1);
  border-color: rgba(192,39,26,0.4);
  transform: translateY(-4px);
}
.mf-b2b-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
.mf-b2b-icon-wrap {
  width: 56px;
  height: 56px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(192,39,26,0.15);
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 26px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.mf-b2b-card:hover .mf-b2b-icon-wrap {
  background: rgba(192,39,26,0.3);
}
.mf-b2b-card-title {
  font-size: 18px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-white);
  margin-bottom: 8px;
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}
.mf-b2b-card-desc {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.mf-b2b-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 6px;
}
.mf-b2b-tag {
  font-size: 11px;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 4px 10px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07);
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55);
  border: 0.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
}
.mf-b2b-stat-row {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1px;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
  margin-top: 40px;
}
.mf-b2b-stat {
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03);
  padding: 28px 24px;
  text-align: center;
}
.mf-b2b-stat-num {
  font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
  font-size: 36px;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: var(--mf-red);
  margin-bottom: 5px;
}
.mf-b2b-stat-label {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5);
}
.mf-b2b-cta {
  margin-top: 40px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 14px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-btn-red-solid {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  color: #fff;
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 13px 32px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mf-btn-red-solid:hover { background: var(--mf-red-dk); }
.mf-btn-ghost-white {
  background: transparent;
  color: rgba(255,255,255,0.75);
  font-size: 14px;
  font-weight: 500;
  padding: 13px 28px;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none;
  border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
  transition: border-color 0.2s, color 0.2s;
  display: inline-block;
}
.mf-btn-ghost-white:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); color: #fff; }

/* ── CTA BANNER ───────────────────────────────────────── */
.mf-cta-banner {
  background: var(--mf-red);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}
.mf-cta-inner {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 70px 48px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 32px;
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.mf-cta-banner::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  right: -80px;
  top: -80px;
  width: 320px;
  height: 320px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.mf-cta-banner::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: -40px;
  bottom: -60px;
  width: 200px;
  height: 200px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
